overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking with a torch through a rainy medieval village at night, accompanied by a mounted NPC guard. The character traverses dirt paths, crosses a stone bridge, and passes historic stone buildings in an atmospheric, cinematic game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with stone ruins approaching village

events.description: passing ancient stone archway ruins with large terracotta urns
yellow timber-framed house comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks with torch held high, following a mounted guard through the rainy countryside

notable_agents.action: guard riding horse ahead on the dirt path

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone archway with broken columns
tall medieval house with yellow plaster and exposed dark wooden beams

low stone wall with tiled cap running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rainy dirt path following a mounted guard, passing ancient stone ruins and approaching a village with a distinctive yellow timber-framed house visible ahead.

events.description: passing rustic wooden workshop shelter on the right
black and white cat appears and begins following Geralt

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues past a wooden workshop where a villager works, with a cat now following alongside

segments.scene_description: Walking past a wooden workshop where a villager works, Geralt is now followed by a cat. The yellow house and stone ruins fall behind as the path continues through the village outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing into village center

events.description: stepping onto stone bridge with wooden railings
passing through stone gate arch into the village proper

agents.ego_description: Geralt crosses the stone bridge and passes through the village gate, still following the mounted guard

wooden fence railings lining both sides of the bridge
large stone gateway with pillars marking the village entrance
wooden directional sign mounted on a stone pillar

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a stone bridge with wooden railings, passing a signpost and moving through a stone gate arch that marks the entrance to the village center.

events.description: passing villagers standing on stone stairs of a house
distant stone tower with conical roof becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the village street passing stone houses and observing villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing on stone stairs watching the street

entered.detail: medieval stone houses with wooden doors and shuttered windows
stone steps leading up to a house entrance
tall stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through the village interior, Geralt passes stone houses with villagers on stairs, while a distant tower becomes visible ahead. The mounted guard continues further down the path toward the tower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy medieval outskirts that gradually transitions into the heart of a fortified village. It begins on a muddy dirt path where Geralt follows a mounted guard past ancient stone ruins toward a distinctive yellow timber-framed house. As the camera moves further into the settlement, the yellow house recedes and the scene shifts past a wooden workshop where a cat joins the procession. The path then leads across a stone bridge with wooden railings and through a stone gate arch that marks the entrance to the village center. Finally, the environment opens up into the village interior, passing stone houses and villagers on stairs as the camera tracks the guard toward a distant tower.
